name: Petstore REST Eval
description: Evaluates REST mock generation quality using the Petstore OpenAPI 3.0 specification

examples.input: Generate WireMock mocks for 4 pets with different statuses (available, pending, sold, and adopted), mocking the GET /pet/{petId} and GET /pet/findByStatus endpoints from the Petstore API.
examples.expectedOutput: 4 WireMock mappings covering GET /pet/{petId} and GET /pet/findByStatus with distinct pet statuses
